CVE-2018-25024.title: An issue was discovered in the actix-web crate before 0.7.15 for  ...
CVE-2018-25024.summary: An issue was discovered in the actix-web crate before 0.7.15 for Rust. It can unsoundly coerce an immutable reference into a mutable reference, leading to memory corruption.

CVE-2018-25025.title: An issue was discovered in the actix-web crate before 0.7.15 for  ...
CVE-2018-25025.summary: An issue was discovered in the actix-web crate before 0.7.15 for Rust. It can unsoundly extend the lifetime of a string, leading to memory corruption.

CVE-2018-25026.title: An issue was discovered in the actix-web crate before 0.7.15 for  ...
CVE-2018-25026.summary: An issue was discovered in the actix-web crate before 0.7.15 for Rust. It can add the Send marker trait to an object that cannot be sent between threads safely, leading to memory corruption.
